data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: Apple's website adapts seamlessly to various screen sizes, providing an optimal viewing experience across devices.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes CSS Flexbox and Grid for layout, alongside media queries for responsiveness.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A robust CDN setup to ensure fast and reliable content delivery globally.
data.technical_spec: Leveraging Akamai and custom servers for efficient content distribution.

data.title: Secure Protocols
data.description: Fully SSL/TLS encrypted to ensure data integrity and privacy.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of HTTPS with modern TLS versions.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Backend services are modular and scalable, improving load management and deployment.
data.technical_spec: Decomposed services communicating over RESTful APIs.

data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: Utilizes cloud-based infrastructures for scalability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Integration with AWS and custom Apple infrastructures.
